Uses of Class
com.senzing.sdk.core.SzCoreEnvironment.Builder

Packages that use SzCoreEnvironment.Builder
Package
Description
com.senzing.sdk.core
This package provides the "core" implementation of the Senzing SDK for Java defined in the com.senzing.sdk package.

  • Uses of SzCoreEnvironment.Builder in com.senzing.sdk.core

    Methods in com.senzing.sdk.core that return SzCoreEnvironment.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SzCoreEnvironment.Builder
    SzCoreEnvironment.Builder.configId(Long configId)
    Sets the explicit configuration ID to use to initialize the SzCoreEnvironment.
    SzCoreEnvironment.Builder
    SzCoreEnvironment.Builder.instanceName(String instanceName)
    Provides the Senzing instance name to configure the SzCoreEnvironment.
    static SzCoreEnvironment.Builder
    SzCoreEnvironment.newBuilder()
    Creates a new instance of SzCoreEnvironment.Builder for setting up an instance of SzCoreEnvironment.
    SzCoreEnvironment.Builder
    SzCoreEnvironment.Builder.settings(String settings)
    Provides the Senzing settings to configure the SzCoreEnvironment.
    SzCoreEnvironment.Builder
    SzCoreEnvironment.Builder.verboseLogging(boolean verboseLogging)
    Sets the verbose logging flag for configuring the SzCoreEnvironment.
